    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    StatementKit.canSafelyWrapWithStatementBlock(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Statement s)
    Deprecated. 
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, ClassType type, String methodName, List<Type> signature)
    Query that returns a list of methods would redefine, implement or are overriden or implemented each other starting from method methodName in type with specified signature .
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, Method method)
    Query that returns a list of methods that redefine, implement or are overriden or implemented each other starting from method method .
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(NameInfo ni, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, ClassType type, String methodName, List<Type> signature)
     
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getInfluencedReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, String newTypeName, NonTerminalProgramElement context)
    Deprecated.
    still untested.
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getRedefiningMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Method m)
    Query that returns a list of methods that redefine or implement the given method.
    static List<MemberReference>
    MethodKit.getReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Method m, NonTerminalProgramElement root, boolean scanTree)
    Query that retrieves all references to a given method that are contained within the given tree.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Type t, NonTerminalProgramElement root, boolean scanTree)
    Query that retrieves all references to a given type that are contained within the given tree.
    static List<VariableReference>
    VariableKit.getReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Variable v, NonTerminalProgramElement root, boolean scanTree)
    Query that retrieves all references to a given variable that are contained within the given tree.
    static List<Import>
    UnitKit.getUnnecessaryImports(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, CompilationUnit cu)
    Query that finds all unnecessary import specifications in a compilation unit.
    static void
    UnitKit.normalizeImports(ChangeHistory ch, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, CompilationUnit cu, boolean removeMultiTypeImports, boolean removeSingleTypeImports, boolean addJavaLangImports, boolean addDefaultPackageImports)
    Deprecated.
    should become a fully grown transformation.
    static void
    UnitKit.removeUnusedImports(ChangeHistory ch, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, CompilationUnit cu)
    Deprecated.
    should become a first class transformation.
    static boolean
    MethodKit.rename(ChangeHistory ch, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, MethodDeclaration method, String newName)
